content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 WARN — SettingsView.swift:12 user-visible toggle subtitle reads "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order", flagging a shipping feature as experimental/unstable to end users.
Pierre: Apple's reviewers may read "Experimental" as evidence the build ships an unfinished feature, which can trigger 2.2 questions about app completeness even though this isn't classic beta/TestFlight language. Since AI Sort is a real, user-facing feature, consider rewording to something like "New: AI-powered sorting" or add a proper in-app "Beta feature" opt-in flow if it's genuinely unstable, rather than exposing "Experimental"/"unstable" wording directly in Settings.
